CREATE TABLE test_bool (id INT PRIMARY KEY, is_active BOOLEAN, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_bool VALUES (1, TRUE, NOW());
INSERT INTO test_bool VALUES (2, FALSE, NOW());
INSERT INTO test_bool VALUES (3, TRUE, NOW());
SELECT id FROM test_bool WHERE is_active = TRUE;
SELECT id FROM test_bool WHERE is_active = FALSE;
SELECT id FROM test_bool WHERE is_active IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_bool WHERE is_active;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, is_admin BOOLEAN);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, is_completed BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, TRUE);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, FALSE);
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (100, 1, TRUE);
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (101, 2, FALSE);
SELECT u.user_id FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.is_admin = TRUE AND o.is_completed = TRUE;
SELECT o.order_id FROM orders o WHERE o.is_completed = FALSE AND o.order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE is_completed = FALSE);
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE is_admin = TRUE) > 0 AS has_admin;
SELECT u.user_id, o.order_id FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.is_admin IS TRUE;
SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE is_completed) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS has_completed_orders;
CREATE TABLE flags (flag_id INT PRIMARY KEY, is_flagged BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE);
INSERT INTO flags VALUES (1, TRUE);
INSERT INTO flags VALUES (2, FALSE);
SELECT f.flag_id FROM flags f WHERE f.is_flagged = TRUE OR f.is_flagged IS FALSE;
CREATE TABLE complex_condition (id INT PRIMARY KEY, condition_met BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO complex_condition VALUES (1, TRUE);
INSERT INTO complex_condition VALUES (2, FALSE);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_condition WHERE condition_met AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flags WHERE is_flagged) > 0;
